conformanceNote: Currently self-built: own ReportDesigner canvas + useReportStore (selection/dnd/history) instead of unified-designer CanvasHost. This is the DDR's single identified misconfiguration. B1 (4-phase) migrates it onto the block-tree kernel; until then B3b's import check is expected to fail this surface by design.
note: Block tree + paged-media layout profile — NOT a new family. Storage migration (ab_page_schema.extension.reportDsl -> ab_report) is B1 Phase 4.
